title: OpenHours — Team Time Tracking
description: A multi-user, self-hosted time-logging app built on top of OpenProject. Teams log hours against projects and tasks; entries are drafted locally and synced to OpenProject, with a policy-aware calendar, weekly targets and per-user stats. In production use at IRN.

title: Income Planner — Portugal
description: A Portuguese income & tax planner that compares working as an employee, freelancer or company (Lda.) side by side with current tax rules — including Coverflex benefits, IRS Jovem, break-even, salary/dividend optimisation and investment projections. Exports to PDF and Excel.

title: Discord Music Bot + Dashboard
description: A multi-guild, MEE6-style Discord bot: play and queue music from YouTube, set up Twitch live notifications and manage feature modules — all configured through a web dashboard with Discord sign-in.

title: ZeroDown
description: A homepage for my personal brand and self-hosted homelab, with live service status. Built with Node.js, Express and TypeScript.

title: Developer Portfolio
description: This portfolio site — a server-rendered Angular 20 app with a light/dark theme, prerendering for SEO, and data-driven sections. Built with Bootstrap and custom SCSS.
